column3:
Secure Travel Environment
Prevent your pet from jumping into the front seat while driving to ensure safety for both the driver and the animal. This barrier creates a dedicated space in the back of the vehicle for your companion to relax during transit.
Universal Fit Design
The 46 by 69 cm dimensions are engineered to fit most standard vehicles including cars and SUVs with ease. It provides a reliable boundary without blocking air circulation or visibility within the cabin.
Durable Lightweight Construction
Crafted from high-quality cloth mesh, this guardrail is both strong enough to withstand pressure and light enough for easy installation. At only 0.22 kg, it is a portable solution for any road trip.
Easy Storage and Setup
The mesh structure allows for quick attachment to headrests or seat frames and can be folded into a compact size when not in use. It stores easily in the glove box or side door pockets when the back seat is needed for passengers.
column38: This pet guardrail measures 46 by 69 centimeters and weighs approximately 0.22 kilograms for easy handling. It features a coarse mesh design available in red or black to match your vehicle interior. The product includes one cloth retaining net that is simple to install and remove as needed.
column39: High-quality cloth mesh. Hand wash with mild soap and water then air dry completely.

column3:
Enhanced Night Visibility
Woven with reflective stitching, this leash ensures you and your pet remain visible to motorists during evening walks. The light-catching threads provide 360-degree visibility for added peace of mind in low-light conditions.
Anti-Burst Protection
The soft sponge handle offers a comfortable grip that protects your hands from sudden bursts or pulling. This ergonomic design reduces strain on your wrist and palm during active training or long strolls.
Secure Attachment Hardware
Equipped with a high-quality zinc alloy swivel hook, the leash provides a strong and rust-proof connection to any collar or harness. The smooth 360-degree rotation prevents the lead from tangling during movement.
Heavy Duty Performance
Constructed from reinforced nylon with herringbone stitching, this rope is built to handle the strength of small to large breeds. The 1.5-meter length offers the perfect balance between freedom and control.
column38: This leash features a 1.5-meter length with a 1.2-centimeter diameter for optimal strength and control. It includes a soft foam handle for comfort and a reflective anti-skid surface for nighttime safety. The heavy-duty swivel hook is made from rust-resistant zinc alloy.
column39: Reinforced Nylon and Zinc Alloy. Wipe clean with a damp cloth and allow to air dry.

column3:
Aerodynamic Flight Design
Engineered with a specific disc shape for dogs, this flying saucer provides stable flight for long-distance fetch games. Its design allows for easy tracking and mid-air catches by your pet.
Gentle on Teeth and Gums
Made from soft, flexible silicone material, this toy is comfortable for puppies and older dogs to carry in their mouths. Unlike hard plastic discs, it will not splinter or cause dental irritation during intense play.
Mental and Physical Stimulation
Interactive play with this disc helps train the coordination between a dog's eyes, brain, and feet. It provides a vigorous workout to help maintain your pet's physical fitness and cardiovascular health.
Eco-Friendly and Safe
The disc is constructed from environmentally friendly plastic and silicone that is non-toxic for your pet. It is durable enough to withstand moderate chewing while being light enough to float through the air.
column38: The flying disc has a 20-centimeter diameter and weighs approximately 40 grams for excellent flight performance. It is competition approved and designed specifically for pet safety during fetch. The flexible construction allows it to be used by both dogs and cats.
column39: Eco-Friendly Silicone and Plastic. Rinse with warm water and mild dish soap after outdoor use.

column3:
One-Click Hair Release
The innovative self-cleaning mechanism allows you to remove collected fur from the bristles with a single press of a button. This saves time during grooming sessions and keeps your hands clean from loose hair.
Gentle Tangle Removal
Finely spaced stainless steel bristles effectively reach through the topcoat to remove loose fur and dander without scratching the skin. Regular use helps prevent painful matting and reduces household shedding significantly.
Massage and Circulation
The rounded tips on the bristles provide a soothing massage that pets find relaxing during grooming. This stimulation helps increase blood circulation to the skin, promoting a healthier and shinier coat.
Ergonomic Comfort Grip
Designed with a sturdy ABS handle, the brush fits comfortably in your hand to reduce fatigue during extended grooming. The non-slip surface ensures you maintain control even when grooming active pets.
column38: This brush features stainless steel bristles and a durable ABS plastic body for long-lasting use. It includes a mechanical hair-release button that retracts the bristles for instant cleaning. The ergonomic handle is designed for long grooming sessions.
column39: ABS Plastic and Stainless Steel bristles. Remove hair after each use and wipe the body with a dry cloth.

column3:
Deep Cleaning Action
The flexible bristles effectively penetrate thick fur to reach the skin, ensuring a thorough clean during bath time. It helps distribute shampoo evenly to create a rich lather that lifts dirt and oils away.
Relaxing Massage Effect
Grooming with this brush provides a gentle massage that can help calm pets who are anxious about bathing. The soft touch mimics petting, turning a stressful chore into a bonding experience for you and your animal.
Comfortable Hand-Held Design
The compact 11.5 by 7.5 cm size fits perfectly in the palm of your hand for total control. The integrated handle allows you to scrub effectively without the brush slipping from your grasp in soapy conditions.
Hygienic and Easy Maintenance
Constructed from high-quality ABS plastic, the brush does not trap bacteria or odors. It is designed to be washed directly with water after use, ensuring it remains clean for the next grooming session.
column38: This multifunctional tool is designed for combing, bathing, and massaging both cats and dogs. It measures 11.5 by 7.5 by 6 centimeters and weighs only 80 grams for easy handling. The brush is made from durable ABS plastic that is water-resistant and easy to sanitize.
column39: High-Quality ABS Plastic. Wash directly with water after each use and allow to air dry.

column3:
Efficient Fur Capture
The specialized rolling surface uses high-quality nylon fiber to trap pet hair, lint, and dust from upholstery and carpets. It works with a simple back-and-forth motion to lift deeply embedded fur that vacuums often miss.
Reusable Eco-Friendly Solution
Unlike traditional sticky rollers, this device requires no adhesive tapes or refills. This makes it a sustainable and cost-effective tool for maintaining a hair-free home over the long term.
Instant Collection Chamber
As you roll, the collected hair is automatically deposited into an internal storage compartment. This keeps the debris contained until you are ready to empty it, preventing hair from flying back onto your surfaces.
Lightweight Portable Build
At just 190 grams, this hair remover is easy to maneuver across sofas, car seats, and clothing. Its compact size makes it convenient to store in a cleaning closet or carry in your vehicle for quick touch-ups.
column38: This hair remover features a durable ABS plastic body and a high-density nylon fiber rolling surface. It measures approximately 190 grams and is designed for use on various surfaces. The internal waste chamber is easy to open and empty with a single click.
column39: ABS Plastic and Nylon Fiber. Empty the internal collection chamber after each use. Wipe the exterior with a damp cloth.

column3:
Customizable Furniture Protection
Protect your sofas, walls, and shelves by applying this self-adhesive carpet to areas where your cat likes to scratch. The trimmable material allows you to cut exact shapes and sizes to fit any piece of furniture perfectly.
Natural Instinct Outlet
Provide your cat with a dedicated surface to sharpen their claws and stretch their muscles. This prevents damage to your home while satisfying their biological need to scratch and mark territory.
Secure and Easy Installation
The strong self-adhesive backing ensures the carpet stays firmly in place on wood, fabric, or plastic surfaces. Installation is as simple as peeling the backing and pressing the pad onto your desired location.
Durable High-Elastic Fiber
Constructed from high-elastic polypropylene, the carpet is designed to withstand intense scratching without fraying quickly. It offers a comfortable texture for your pet to rest on or play with.
column38: This scratch carpet is made from high-elastic polypropylene fiber and comes with a self-adhesive backing. It is available in multiple sizes ranging from 30x30 cm to 40x300 cm. The material is easily trimmable with standard household scissors.
column39: High-Elastic Polypropylene Fiber. Replace once worn. Vacuum or use a lint roller to remove loose fur.

column3:
Effective Knot Prevention
The precision-spaced stainless steel teeth glides through the coat to untangle knots and remove trapped debris. Regular combing prevents the formation of painful mats in long-haired breeds and keeps the fur smooth.
Skin Health and Circulation
Combing provides a gentle stimulation to the skin that boosts blood circulation and encourages the production of natural oils. This results in a healthier, more vibrant coat and reduced skin irritation for your pet.
Bacteria Resistant Design
Stainless steel is naturally resistant to bacteria and easy to sanitize, making it a hygienic choice for regular grooming. The smooth metal surface prevents fur from snagging or pulling during the detangling process.
Comfortable Control Handle
The ergonomic handle provides a secure grip that allows for precise movements around sensitive areas like the ears and paws. It is balanced to reduce hand fatigue during thorough grooming sessions.
column38: This grooming tool features high-quality stainless steel teeth and a durable plastic handle. It is designed for both cats and dogs to help open knots. The comb is sized for easy storage in a pet care kit.
column39: Stainless Steel and Plastic. Clean the teeth after each use. Sanitize with mild alcohol if needed and dry thoroughly.

column3:
Dual-Action Hair Removal
The specialized teeth design effectively removes loose undercoat while the outer comb smooths the topcoat for a finished look. It helps reduce overall shedding in the home by capturing hair before it falls.
Relaxing Massage Experience
This comb acts as a gentle massager that helps your pet relax during grooming. The pleasant sensation can help build trust and improve the bond between you and your animal companion.
Gentle on Sensitive Skin
Engineered to be effective without being abrasive, the comb glides smoothly over the skin to prevent irritation. It is suitable for pets with short to medium-length coats who may be sensitive to traditional wire brushes.
Compact Ergonomic Build
The lightweight 83-gram design is easy to handle and maneuver over your pet's body contours. Its ergonomic shape ensures comfort for the user during daily maintenance routines.
column38: This grooming comb weighs approximately 83 grams and is made from premium ABS and stainless steel. It is specifically designed to provide a massage while removing loose fur. The compact size is ideal for travel.
column39: ABS Plastic and Stainless Steel. Rinse under running water and store in a dry place.

column3:
Integrated Shampoo Dispensing
The innovative design allows you to pour pet shampoo directly into the brush reservoir for easy dispensing during baths. This streamlines the cleaning process and ensures the soap reaches deep into the coat.
Soft Silicone Scrubbing
The flexible silicone bristles provide a deep clean while being incredibly gentle on your pet's skin. It effectively removes dirt, dander, and loose fur without the harshness of plastic or wire brushes.
Hand-Held Ergonomic Grip
The glove-style handle allows you to wear the brush, giving you a natural petting motion while you clean. This provides a secure grip in wet and slippery conditions, making bath time more efficient.
Soothing Massage Effect
As you scrub, the silicone bristles massage the skin to promote circulation and relaxation. It turns a standard bath into a spa-like experience that can help reduce anxiety in water-sensitive pets.
column38: This bath tool is made from soft, high-quality silicone. It features a built-in shampoo reservoir and a hand-held strap for secure usage. The brush is designed for both dogs and cats and is easy to clean.
column39: Food-Grade Silicone. Rinse thoroughly with warm water after each use. Air dry completely.

column3:
All-in-One Adventure Kit
This versatile travel bottle combines a water dispenser, food compartment, and waste bag storage into a single compact unit. It eliminates the need for multiple bulky accessories during hikes or park visits.
Leak-Proof Water Dispenser
The integrated drinking bowl allows your pet to lap up fresh water easily while the secure lock button prevents any accidental spills in your bag. Its one-handed operation is ideal for busy owners on the move.
Integrated Food and Waste Storage
The detachable bottom section provides a safe space for treats or dry food, and a built-in dispenser holds standard-sized poop bags. This ensures you are prepared for both nutrition and cleanup anywhere.
Durable Travel-Ready Build
Constructed from high-impact ABS plastic, the bottle is designed to withstand the rigors of outdoor use. Its lightweight design and attached carry strap make it comfortable to carry for long durations.
column38: The bottle features separate compartments for water, food, and waste bags. It is made from high-impact ABS and PC plastic for durability. It includes a lanyard and fits in most car cup holders.
column39: High-Impact ABS and PC Plastic. Hand wash all compartments with mild soap and water.

column3:
Transformable Nest Design
This versatile bed can be used as a cozy hooded sanctuary for burrowing or flattened into a traditional open-style round cushion. It adapts to your pet's preference for privacy or visibility throughout the day.
Self-Warming Velvet Fabric
The long crystal velvet material traps body heat to keep your cat or dog warm during cold winter months. This provides a nurturing and high-comfort environment that promotes deeper, more restful sleep.
Orthopedic Supportive Filling
Stuffed with high-elastic PP cotton, the bed offers excellent support for joints and muscles while remaining exceptionally soft. It maintains its shape even after prolonged use by heavy or active pets.
Anti-Slip Safety Base
The bottom of the bed features a non-slip, moisture-proof fabric that prevents it from shifting on hardwood or tile floors. This ensures your pet feels secure when jumping into or settling down for a nap.
column38: The bed is made from warm crystal velvet and filled with premium PP cotton. It features a convertible design and a non-slip moisture-proof base. Available in multiple sizes from 40cm to 65cm.
column39: Crystal Velvet and PP Cotton. Machine wash on gentle cycle or hand wash. Tumble dry on low.

column3:
Rapid Moisture Absorption
Constructed from high-density chenille microfiber, this bathrobe wicks away water from your pet's coat instantly. This significantly reduces drying time after baths or wet walks and prevents the "wet dog" smell.
Warm Post-Bath Protection
Wrapping your pet in this soft robe helps them retain body heat and avoid shivering when they are damp. It provides a cozy and calming sensation that helps pets relax after grooming sessions.
Mess-Free Drying Solution
The full-coverage design prevents your pet from shaking water onto your furniture, walls, or carpet. This keeps your home clean and dry while your pet finishes their post-bath drying process comfortably.
User-Friendly Dual Pockets
Equipped with unique hand pockets on each side, the robe allows you to grip and dry your pet easily with both hands. This provides better control and a more thorough dry for long-haired or active animals.
column38: The bathrobe is made from super-permeable chenille fiber. It includes dual hand pockets for controlled drying and a hanging loop. The soft fabric is gentle on all skin types.
column39: Super-Permeable Chenille Fiber. Machine wash with like colors and air dry.

column3:
Secure Driver Safety
This vehicle restraint prevents your pet from distracting the driver or jumping into the front seat during travel. It ensures everyone in the car remains focused on the road while the pet stays safely in place.
Adjustable Freedom of Movement
The sliding buckle allows you to set the perfect length so your dog can sit, stand, or lie down comfortably. It provides a customized fit that accommodates various pet sizes and car types effortlessly.
Universal Compatibility
The standard latch design is compatible with most vehicle seat belt receivers, making it easy to swap between cars. It offers a hassle-free setup that takes only seconds to secure before your journey begins.
Durable Hardware Construction
Made with high-quality nylon webbing and a zinc alloy swivel hook, the seat belt is built to withstand tension. The rust-proof hardware ensures reliable performance through years of frequent travel.
column38: This seat belt features high-quality nylon cloth and durable zinc alloy. It is fully adjustable in length. The universal latch is compatible with standard car seat belt systems.
column39: High-Quality Nylon and Zinc Alloy. Wipe the webbing with a damp cloth.

column3:
Safe Hands-Free Travel
This crossbody carrier allows you to transport your small pet comfortably while keeping your hands free for other tasks. It is ideal for shopping, walking, or visiting the vet with minimal strain on your body.
Superior Air Circulation
Crafted from breathable Oxford fabric and mesh, the bag ensures your pet remains cool and well-ventilated during outings. This helps prevent overheating and keeps your companion calm in busy environments.
Secure Closure System
The adjustable drawstring opening allows you to customize the size of the head hole for a safe and snug fit. An internal safety tether can be attached to your pet's collar to prevent accidental jumps.
Ergonomic Comfort for Owners
The wide, padded shoulder strap distributes weight evenly across your back and shoulder to reduce pressure. Its lightweight design makes it comfortable for extended wear on longer outdoor adventures.
column38: The carrier is made from durable Oxford fabric and breathable mesh. It includes an adjustable drawstring closure and a secure zippered base. The wide shoulder strap reduces strain.
column39: Oxford Fabric and Breathable Mesh. Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent.

column3:
Ergonomic No-Pull Control
This harness is designed to distribute pressure evenly across the chest and shoulders rather than the neck to prevent choking. It provides a gentler walking experience and better control for dogs that tend to pull.
Reflective Safety Straps
High-visibility reflective stitching ensures your pet remains seen by motorists and pedestrians during nighttime walks. This added layer of safety provides security for evening training or early morning strolls.
Customizable Comfort Fit
Equipped with multiple adjustable buckles, the harness can be fine-tuned to fit your pet's unique body shape perfectly. The breathable mesh lining prevents chafing and keeps your dog cool during active play.
Durable Control Handle
A sturdy built-in handle on the back allow for immediate control in crowded areas or emergency situations. It is reinforced to handle the strength of medium to large breeds with confidence.
column38: This harness features reinforced nylon with breathable mesh lining. It includes reflective safety straps and a heavy-duty control handle. The adjustable buckles allow for a custom fit.
column39: Reinforced Nylon and Air Mesh. Hand wash with mild soap and water.

column3:
Unpredictable Hunting Motion
The toy car mimics the movements of small prey with rapid turns and 360-degree rotations. This stimulates a cat's natural hunting instincts and provides vigorous exercise to help maintain a healthy weight.
Dual Smart Play Modes
Choose between manual remote control for interactive bonding or automatic mode for self-play when you are busy. In automatic mode, the car uses intelligent sensors to avoid obstacles and navigate around furniture.
Whisper-Quiet Rolling Action
Constructed with high-quality silicone wheels, the car rolls silently across hardwood floors and carpets. This ensures your cat remains engaged by the motion without being startled by loud mechanical noises.
USB Rechargeable Convenience
The built-in battery provides hours of entertainment on a single charge and eliminates the need for expensive disposables. The included USB cable makes it easy to power up the toy from any standard port.
column38: The car features dual control modes (manual/auto) and silent 360-degree rolling. It includes intelligent obstacle avoidance and a USB-rechargeable battery.
column39: High-Impact Silicone and ABS Plastic. Wipe with a damp cloth.

column3:
Orthopedic Bolster Support
The raised backrest and sides provide a secure "nesting" feeling that reduces anxiety and offers head and neck support. It is ideal for pets who prefer to sleep with their head elevated or enjoy leaning against a soft surface.
Premium Velvet Warmth
Lined with ultra-soft crystal velvet, this sofa bed provides exceptional heat retention for use during colder seasons. The thick plush texture offers a luxurious sanctuary for long, restorative naps.
High-Elastic Comfort Filling
The internal filling consists of premium PP cotton that maintains its loft and support over time. This high-density padding cushions joints and pressure points to ensure maximum comfort for small to medium pets.
Moisture-Proof Non-Slip Base
The base is constructed from an anti-slip fabric that prevents the bed from sliding when your pet enters or exits. This moisture-resistant layer also protects your flooring from any accidental spills or humidity.
column38: This bed features an integrated bolster design and built-in comfort pillow. It includes an anti-slip moisture-proof base for stability.
column39: Soft Textile Cloth and PP Cotton. Machine wash on gentle or hand wash.

column3:
Engaging IQ Stimulation
This interactive tumbler rewards your pet with treats as they figure out how to roll and tilt the device. It challenges their problem-solving skills and provides mental enrichment to prevent boredom and destructive behavior.
Healthy Slow Feeding
By dispensing food in small amounts during play, this toy prevents pets from eating too quickly. This promotes better digestion and helps prevent bloating or discomfort associated with rapid consumption.
Self-Righting Balance Motion
The unique weighted base ensures the toy always returns to an upright position regardless of how much it is batted or pushed. This unpredictable movement keeps pets intrigued and engaged for longer play sessions.
Durable Food-Safe Build
Constructed from non-toxic, high-strength ABS plastic, the toy is built to withstand enthusiastic play and chewing. Its smooth surfaces are safe for your pet's mouth and easy to clean after mealtime.
column38: The toy features a self-standing balance design and adjustable treat-release hole. It is made from high-strength ABS for durability.
column39: Non-Toxic High-Strength ABS. Wash with warm water and mild soap.

column3:
Active Instinctual Exercise
This 360-degree rotating ball stimulates a cat's natural hunting instincts by moving unpredictably across the floor. It encourages running, jumping, and pouncing to help your indoor cat stay physically fit and active.
Captivating LED Light Effects
Equipped with both red and colorful LED lights, the ball captures your pet's attention even in low-light environments. The varying light patterns provide visual stimulation that keeps cats curious and engaged for long durations.
Smart Obstacle Avoidance
The intelligent internal sensor allows the ball to change direction automatically when it hits a wall or furniture. This prevents the toy from getting stuck in corners and ensures continuous play without owner intervention.
Automatic Safety Timer
A built-in 45-minute auto-shutoff timer ensures the ball doesn't drain its battery when your pet is finished playing. This safety feature also prevents your cat from over-exerting themselves during intense sessions.
column38: The ball features 360-degree automatic direction changes and a USB-rechargeable battery. It includes red laser and multi-color LED modes.
column39: Transparent Eco-Friendly ABS. Wipe with a dry cloth.

Natural Wooden Rabbit Hay Feeder
Encourage healthy eating habits with this apple wood rabbit hay feeder designed for small pets. It promotes natural foraging behavior while keeping hay clean, dry, and easily accessible.
Supports Digestive and Dental Health
Made from safe apple wood, this wooden grass feeder doubles as a chew-friendly structure that helps maintain proper tooth wear for rabbits, guinea pigs, and other small animals.
Reduces Hay Waste and Mess
The elevated wooden shelf design prevents hay from being scattered across the cage floor. Keep your rabbit’s habitat cleaner while minimizing wasted grass and bedding contamination.
Safe Durable and Pet Friendly
Crafted from natural apple wood and branches, this sturdy small pet hay rack is non-toxic, durable, and ideal for everyday use in indoor cages or outdoor hutches.
column38: This small size wooden rabbit grass feeder is available in three styles: Apple Branch Frame, Apple Branch with Wooden Beads, and Apple Wood with Apple Branch Frame. Designed for rabbits and other small pets that require daily hay feeding.
column39: Material: Natural Apple Wood Construction. Wipe clean with a dry or slightly damp cloth. Do not soak in water to maintain wood durability.
